description: A list of all available Cloudflare MCP servers, including the code-mode server for broad API access and domain-specific servers for individual Cloudflare products.
name: cloudflare-mcps

servers.name: Code mode API
servers.description: Broad access to the full Cloudflare API via code execution, with minimal token overhead

servers.name: Documentation server
servers.description: Get up to date reference information on Cloudflare

servers.name: Workers Bindings server
servers.description: Build Workers applications with storage, AI, and compute primitives

servers.name: Workers Builds server
servers.description: Get insights and manage your Cloudflare Workers Builds

servers.name: Observability server
servers.description: Debug and get insight into your application's logs and analytics

servers.name: Container server
servers.description: Spin up a sandbox development environment

servers.name: Browser Run server
servers.description: Fetch web pages, convert them to markdown and take screenshots

servers.name: Logpush server
servers.description: Get quick summaries for Logpush job health

servers.name: AI Gateway server
servers.description: Search your logs, get details about the prompts and responses

servers.name: Audit Logs server
servers.description: Query audit logs and generate reports for review

servers.name: DNS Analytics server
servers.description: Optimize DNS performance and debug issues based on current set up

servers.name: Digital Experience Monitoring server
servers.description: Get quick insight on critical applications for your organization

servers.name: Cloudflare One CASB server
servers.description: Quickly identify any security misconfigurations for SaaS applications to safeguard users & data

servers.name: GraphQL server
servers.description: Get analytics data using Cloudflare’s GraphQL API

servers.name: Cloudflare Blog server
servers.description: Search and read posts from the Cloudflare Blog
